tasks.title: Add first-time user detection and landing page display logic in app entry
tasks.description: Modify the main app entry component (e.g., src/App.tsx or equivalent) to detect if the user is visiting for the first time by checking a flag in localStorage (e.g., 'hasVisited'). If not set, show the landing page component instead of the main app content. After the first visit, set the flag to prevent showing the landing page again. The landing page should be a new React component that welcomes the user and briefly introduces the website.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page is shown only on first visit
After first visit, main app content is shown on subsequent visits
tasks.expectedResult: The app shows a landing page on first visit and main content on subsequent visits, verified by localStorage flag

outputPlan.description: Add first-time user detection and conditional rendering of landing page
Landing page React component for first-time users

metadata.inputContext: Current app entry component and routing logic
evidence: App.tsx modified with first-time visit logic
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the initial user experience for first-time visitors

tasks.title: Create new tabs for website info, about me, recruit, donate, and feedback
tasks.description: Add new tabs/pages in the app navigation for 'Website Info', 'About Me', 'Recruit', 'Donate', and 'Send Feedback'. Each tab should be a separate React component under src/features/info/ with appropriate content placeholders. Update the main navigation component to include these tabs. The 'Send Feedback' tab should include a simple form with fields for user message and contact info, with a submit handler that currently logs the input (no backend integration).
acceptanceCriteria: New tabs appear in the main navigation
Each tab renders its respective component
Send Feedback tab has a functional form with submit handler
tasks.expectedResult: New tabs are added and accessible with placeholder content and a working feedback form

outputPlan.description: Website Info tab component with info about the website
About Me tab component with info about the developer for recruitment
Recruit tab component with recruitment info
Donate tab component with donation info and links
Send Feedback tab component with a feedback form and submit handler
Add new tabs to main navigation menu

metadata.inputContext: App navigation component and routing setup
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Adds informational and interactive tabs for user engagement and feedback
